name: iBio, Inc.
summary: iBio, Inc. is a preclinical stage biotechnology company using Artificial Intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) to develop precision antibody therapeutics targeting obesity and cardiometabolic diseases. Key pipeline assets include IBIO-600 (anti-myostatin antibody) and IBIO-610 (Activin E antibody), developed via an AI-enabled epitope steering and antibody optimization platform. The company operates from a San Diego R&D laboratory and anticipates first human clinical trials in late fiscal 2026 or early fiscal 2027.

products.name: IBIO-600
products.description: Long-acting anti-myostatin antibody in IND-enabling studies aimed at muscle preservation and fat reduction.

products.name: IBIO-610
products.description: Activin E antibody development candidate targeting fat-specific weight loss with GLP-1 combination potential.

products.name: Myostatin Activin A Bispecific Antibody
products.description: Bispecific antibody simultaneously inhibiting two muscle suppressors, demonstrated in vitro proof of concept.

products.name: AI Drug Discovery Platform
products.description: Integrated AI-enabled epitope steering engine and antibody optimization platform capable of progressing concept to development-ready antibody in ~7 months.

partnerships.description: Multi-target discovery collaboration for obesity and cardiometabolic targets; expanded to five targets; iBio in-licensed IBIO-600 and IBIO-610 from AstralBio.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
